prose: The frontier (HOMO-LUMO) energies of water were computed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The HOMO energy is -8.603720 eV, the LUMO energy is 0.336950 eV, resulting in a HOMO-LUMO gap of approximately 8.94067 eV. The SCF converged in 7 cycles. The calculation was performed with chemkit using the PySCF engine.
